channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: aattaran/deepclaude
item.description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper.

item.title: WeritoP/FL-STUDIO-PATCHER
item.description: Fl Stduio patch for lifetime works

item.title: mahimairaja/voiceai
item.description: Set of 📝 with 🔗 to help those building Voice AI agents 🎙️🤖

item.title: Kappaemme-git/codex-startup-pressure-test-skill
item.description: (no description)

item.title: pluk-inc/md-preview.app
item.description: A simple Markdown viewer for reading .md files

item.title: AlexCheema/talos-vs-macbook
item.description: microGPT benchmarks: a single M4 Max MacBook Pro P-core in C runs Karpathy's 4192-parameter transformer at ~71x the throughput of TALOS-V2's FPGA implementation.

item.title: Luthiraa/TALOS-V2
item.description: hardware implementation of transformers running microgpt at 50k+ tkps

item.title: 1weiho/open-slide
item.description: A slide framework built for agents.

item.title: Sambigeara/pollen
item.description: Distributed WASM runtime. Workloads place themselves over a zero-trust mesh. One static binary.

item.title: vibeforge1111/keep-codex-fast
item.description: A backup-first Codex skill for keeping local Codex state fast, clean, and recoverable.

item.title: tddworks/baguette
item.description: Headless iOS Simulator manager/farm + host-side input injection for iOS 26 — taps, swipes, multi-finger gestures, and 60 fps streaming

item.title: webadderallorg/Recordly
item.description: Create polished screen recordings without editing. Mac/Windows/Linux

item.title: vercel-labs/ai-cli
item.description: Generate anything from your terminal

item.title: microsoft/lib0xc
item.description: Safe(ish) C programming library

item.title: withastro/flue
item.description: The sandbox agent framework.

item.title: 1jehuang/jcode
item.description: Coding Agent Harness

item.title: browser-use/desktop-app
item.description: Browser Use Desktop App

item.title: denuitt1/mhr-cfw
item.description: A Domain-Fronting Relay that routes traffic though GAS (Google Apps Script) and forwards it to Cloudflare Workers. Designed to bypass DPI.

item.title: warpdotdev/warp
item.description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.

item.title: mattpocock/dictionary-of-ai-coding
item.description: AI coding jargon, explained in plain English.

item.title: zerx-lab/warp
item.description: OpenWarp is a free version of the open source client based on warp

item.title: tiangolo/library-skills
item.description: Library Agent Skills

item.title: kitlangton/ghui
item.description: (no description)

item.title: nex-crm/wuphf
item.description: WUPHF is a collaborative office of AI employees who build and maintain their own knowledge base to never lose context for the tasks you give them. Supports Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw and local LLMs via OpenCode.

item.title: Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
item.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

item.title: darrylmorley/whatcable
item.description: macOS menu bar app that tells you, in plain English, what each USB-C cable plugged into your Mac can actually do

item.title: refactoringhq/tolaria
item.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: b-nnett/codex-plusplus
item.description: Codex++ tweak system for the Codex desktop app

item.title: ammaarreshi/gemma-chat
item.description: Local AI chat + coding agent for Apple Silicon, powered by Gemma 4 via MLX / Supports Ollama

item.title: t8y2/dbx
item.description: Open-source, lightweight, cross-platform database client. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse, SQL Server.

item.title: google/skills
item.description: Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

item.title: EvanBacon/serve-sim
item.description: The `npx serve` of Apple Simulators.

item.title: context-labs/HALO
item.description: Hierarchal Agent Loop Optimizer

item.title: SnailSploit/Claude-Red
item.description: claude-red is a curated library of offensive security skills designed for the Claude skills system. Each skill is a structured SKILL.md file that primes Claude with expert-level methodology for a specific attack surface — from SQLi to shellcode, EDR evasion to exploit development.

item.title: willchen96/mike
item.description: OSS AI Legal Platform

item.title: cursor/cookbook
item.description: (no description)

item.title: theori-io/copy-fail-CVE-2026-31431
item.description: (no description)

item.title: huggingface/ml-intern
item.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models

item.title: ps5-linux/ps5-linux-loader
item.description: Linux payload implementing the HV exploit and a custom bootloader

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first open replica of Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems · 🖼️ sandboxed preview · 📦 HTML/PDF/PPTX export. 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini CLI / OpenCode / Qwen.

item.title: openai/realtime-voice-component
item.description: (no description)

item.title: EvoLinkAI/awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
item.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.

item.title: evanklem/evanflow
item.description: A TDD-driven iterative feedback loop for software development. 16 cohesive Claude Code skills walk an idea from brainstorm → plan → execute → iterate, with checkpoints throughout.

item.title: cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent
item.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.

item.title: vthinkxie/illustrated-explainer-spec
item.description: Spec for an infinite drill-down illustrated explainer — type a topic, click anywhere on the image to generate the next page.
